title: cynoglossum papillosum
intro: Cynoglossum papillosum, also known as the hairy tongue flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and sore throats. The health benefits of Cynoglossum papillosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Cynoglossum papillosum can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
